sql_array: CREATE TABLE sizes_table (id UInt32, readable_size String);
INSERT INTO sizes_table VALUES (1, '1 B'), (2, '1 KiB'), (3, '3 MB'), (4, '5.314 KiB'), (5, 'invalid');
SELECT id, readable_size, parseReadableSizeOrZero(readable_size) AS size_in_bytes FROM sizes_table;
UPDATE sizes_table SET readable_size = '5 MB' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, parseReadableSizeOrZero(readable_size) AS size_in_bytes FROM sizes_table WHERE size_in_bytes > 1024;
